query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'work_orders' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('date_completed', 'supervisor', 'facops_suite', 'type_code', 'estimated_hours', 'hours_remaining', 'asset_id', 'last_saved');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'work_orders' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('date_completed', 'supervisor', 'facops_suite', 'type_code', 'estimated_hours', 'hours_remaining', 'asset_id', 'last_saved');
